arabic: وَصَلْتُ إِلَى مَطَارِ مَسْقَطَ الدَّوْلِيِّ فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ. كَانَتِ الرِّحْلَةُ طَوِيلَةً وَلَكِنَّهَا مُرِيحَةٌ جِدًّا. ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى مَكْتَبِ الْجَوَازَاتِ لِأَخْتِمَ جَوَازَ سَفَرِي. ثُمَّ انْتَظَرْتُ حَقِيبَتِي عِنْدَ مَكَانِ اسْتِلَامِ الْأَمْتِعَةِ. فِي النِّهَايَةِ، رَكِبْتُ سَيَّارَةَ أُجْرَةٍ لِلذَّهَابِ إِلَى الْفُنْدُقِ.
translation: Stigao sam na međunarodni aerodrom u Maskatu rano ujutro. Let je bio dug, ali veoma udoban. Otišao sam do pasoške kontrole da mi udare pečat u pasoš. Zatim sam sačekao svoj kofer na mjestu za preuzimanje prtljaga. Na kraju sam ušao u taksi kako bih otišao do hotela.
translationEn: I arrived at Muscat International Airport early in the morning. The flight was long but very comfortable. I went to the passport office to have my passport stamped. Then, I waited for my suitcase at the baggage claim area. Finally, I took a taxi to go to the hotel.
